<?php /** * Name is deprecated, but allowed in strict doctypes, so only */ class HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule_Tidy_Name extends HTMLPurifier_HTMLModule_Tidy { /** * @type string */ public $name = 'Tidy_Name'; /** * @type string */ public $defaultLevel = 'heavy'; /** * @return array */ public function makeFixes() { $r = array(); // @name for img, a ----------------------------------------------- // Technically, it's allowed even on strict, so we allow authors to use // it. However, it's deprecated in future versions of XHTML. $r['img@name'] = $r['a@name'] = new HTMLPurifier_AttrTransform_Name(); return $r; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
